query:
SELECT st.id, st.type, st.amount, st.smsCount, st.balanceBefore, st.balanceAfter, st.description, st.createdAt, sb.costPerSms 
FROM sms_transactions st 
JOIN sms_balance sb ON st.establishmentId = sb.establishmentId 
WHERE st.type = 'debit'
ORDER BY st.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:
